next_step.observation: The 2026-02-19 invoice contains the target line item 'workflow mapping and intake audit' for 420 EUR, and the other matching invoices are dated before February 2026.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap with root tree, AGENTS.MD, and context. Inspected 99_system before task work as required by AGENTS.MD. Read nested AGENTS.MD files in 50_finance and 50_finance/invoices before using invoice records.
function.outcome_justification: Search found three invoice records containing the exact line item 'workflow mapping and intake audit'. Reading the records showed dated line items of 520 EUR on 2025-11-19, 260 EUR on 2025-12-21, and 420 EUR on 2026-02-19. Only the 2026-02-19 record falls within 'from February 2026' onward, so the total is 420.
